$comment: Example FirestoreSchemaDeclaration for scripts/firestore-drift-gate-check.ts. Copy into a Firestore-based project (e.g. the aria_app_* family) as e.g. firestore-schema.json, fill in real collection names + fields, and wire `tsx scripts/firestore-drift-gate-check.ts --schema firestore-schema.json --root app --root lib` into CI. See docs/schema-drift-guide.md.

deprecatedFields.proposed_content: Renamed to suggested_content — see [[daycare_dashboard_type_schema_drift]] (same drift family in the Supabase world).
